Taj MAHAL, Bologna-Italy, 9 april 1978, guest Richie Heavens, 2d gen SB + Bonus FM master 78

An interesting SB Taj solo, even there is some background noise (sound is A-, check the sample).
Richie Heavens came on stage for the last song.
As a bonus, 4 tunes played in Paris-France Le Palace 23 november 1978 are added.


Cassettes - Marantz SD 4051 deck - Zoom H5 - SD card on PC - Audacity (volume, tracks, FLAC export) md5 with TLH.

In Bologna, Taj Mahal on Vocals, guitar & piano.
In Paris, he plays with a band.

Setlist :

01 Sweet Home Chicago
02 Dust My Broom
03 Cakewalk Into Town
04 Nobody's Business But My Own
05 Queen Bee
06 Going up to the Country, Paint My Mailbox Blue
07 Stagger Lee
08 Statesboro Blues
09 L.O.V.E
10 Instrumental
11 Light Rain Blues
12 Johnny Too Bad
13 Candy Man
14 Spoonful
15 Corrina
16 Fishin' Blues
17 Rockin' Pneumonia & The Boogie Woogie Flu
18 I Wish I Was In Houston Blues
19 ... (with guest Richie Heavens)
20 Going up to the Country, Paint My Mailbox Blue
21 Instrumental
22 Baby You're My Destiny
23 Queen Bee

(20-23 : Paris 78)
